steps.title: Read the line of best fit
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted temperature at $4{,}000$ feet, so use the line of best fit, not an individual data point.

steps.title: Find the y-value
steps.content: At $x=4{,}000$, the line of best fit is at about $35^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $35$, so B is correct.
